description_long: This armchair features a wide, deep seat and a tall, rectangular backrest, both generously padded for comfort. The upholstery is a soft, muted pinkish-beige fabric with a subtle, uniform texture, giving it a modern yet cozy appearance. The armrests are thick, straight, and fully upholstered, seamlessly integrated with the seat and backrest. The chair sits on a sturdy, black metal frame with four straight legs, slightly angled for stability. The overall silhouette is boxy and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. This design is suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, parks, or outdoor lounges, offering both style and comfort.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with soft pinkish-beige fabric upholstery, thick padded seat and backrest, and black metal legs. Its clean lines and plush design make it inviting and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, deep seat, tall padded backrest, and thick, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the backrest, and the straight, upholstered armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tall, rectangular backrest and the simple, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and the sturdy black metal legs.
attribute_armrest_design: thick, straight, padded and fully upholstered
attribute_backrest_style: tall, rectangular, padded and fully upholstered
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with subtle fabric texture
